command.purpose: Review available analysis and design artifacts for consistency, traceability, completeness, and implementation readiness.

accepted-inputs.heading: Accepted Inputs
accepted-inputs.input: OpenSpec proposal, design, specifications, and tasks
Any partial combination of these artifacts

workflow.step: Inventory the provided artifacts and identify their authority.
Trace requirements, decisions, planned work, and verification across the available set.
Detect contradictions, scope drift, gaps, unresolved blockers, and stale derivations.
Rank findings by severity and recommend explicit corrections.
Report readiness as `READY`, `READY WITH WARNINGS`, or `NOT READY`.

safeguards.item: Accept partial artifact sets without requiring every artifact type.
Do not modify artifacts or resolve conflicts without explicit user approval.
